---
# title: "Megan Zhao"
title: "Megan Zhao"
# imbeding image - professional headshot
image: media/shrew-epicsauce.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  # creating buttons
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:meganzhao.06@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin 
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/meganzhao06/
      # open link in a new browser tab
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://https://github.com/meandmymonky
      # open link in a new browser tab
      target: _blank
---

bello I am megan
